channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Brutal Texas primary night points to trouble ahead for House incumbents
item.description: One House Republican lost his seat outright in Texas' primary elections Tuesday night, and four other House members will face grueling, 12-week runoff...

item.title: Americans aren't sold on Iran attacks, new polls show
item.description: Some five days into the sprawling Middle East conflict sparked by U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran, significantly more Americans disapprove than approve o...

item.title: The labor market is finally stabilizing, but there's a catch
item.description: New private sector data shows signs of life for a labor market that's stabilizing after a dismal year for hiring. Why it matters: It's a welcome devel...

item.title: Trump expected to endorse Cornyn in brutal Texas Senate runoff
item.description: President Trump is expected to endorse Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas Senate race , a source with knowledge of the talks tells Axios. Why it matters: T...

item.title: James Talarico wins Democratic primary in Texas' U.S. Senate race
item.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico of Austin defeated U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett of Dallas for the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Texas. Why it...

item.title: State Dept. scrambles to aid stranded Americans amid attacks, airport closures
item.description: The Trump administration said it is looking to use a mix of military and chartered flights to help U.S. citizens leave the Middle East as Iran steps u...

item.title: Senate will vote on forcing Trump to end Iran strikes
item.description: Congress has voted on seven other war powers resolutions since June, all of which failed.

item.title: Rep. Gonzales faces ethics investigation over allegations of affair with aide
item.description: The announcement ensures the controversy will continue to dog the Republican congressman as he heads into a primary runoff.

item.title: Spanish prime minister slams Trump’s war in Iran, escalating feud
item.description: By criticizing the U.S.-led attack and refusing to bow to Trump’s threat of trade retaliation, Pedro Sánchez set himself apart from other European lea...

item.title: Trump could blunt Democrats’ momentum in Texas with key endorsement
item.description: The GOP Senate candidates will spend two more months attacking each other, while Democrat James Talarico must shore up the base.

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
